/usr/bin/ar qc libdune_core.a CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/grains/piv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/grains/reconstruction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/grains/validation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/sun/colormap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/sun/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/sun/lib/stb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/sun/mask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dune_core.dir/src/wind/vectorfield.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdune_core.a
